name: Viscount Mining Corp.
summary: Viscount Mining Corp. explores for and evaluates mineral properties in the United States. It explores for gold, silver, precious, and base metals. The company's flagship property is the Silver Cliff project that consists of 96 lode claims located in Colorado. It also holds a 100% interest in the Cherry Creek project comprising 9,000 acres situated in White Pine County, Nevada. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in North Vancouver, Canada.
